title: A medicament to control and reduce hypertension
abstract: An object of the present invention disclosed a medicament (10) consists of a combination of amino acids (11); antioxidant (12); magnesium glycinate (13); plant flavonoid (14); coenzyme Q10 (15); a combination of vitamins B (16); vitamin D3 (17); fish oil (18); garlic (19); and potassium chloride (20) for use to control and reduce hypertension. Each of the components in the medicament (10) has specific amount (in range) to effectively control and reduce hypertension.
